ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., transistor, diode) */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the device in micrometers */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the device in micrometers */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the device in micrometers */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or manufacturer of the device */,
  "fabrication_date" TEXT /* Date the device was fabricated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes in device design */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used in the experiment */,
  "vds" REAL /* Drain-source voltage (Vds) in volts */,
  "vgs" REAL /* Gate-source voltage (Vgs) in volts */,
  "ids" REAL /* Drain current (Ids) in amperes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes in experimental data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
